The meat would fail to sear
The onions would become too soft

Skill 적절성: Counterfactual reasoning based on the domain rule regarding butter's smoke point and milk solids. 정답 근거: Butter is added late to baste the meat because adding it early at high searing temperatures would burn the milk solids.
